title: hieracium subramosum subsp. orarium
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. orarium, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and bitter taste. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against chronic diseases and promote overall well-being. Hieracium subramosum subsp. orarium can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
